Hi Manuel, It was great meeting you at the Granite Park Capital yacht mixer — I really appreciated you joining us. I’d love to continue our conversation and understand if our fund and investment strategy are the right fit for you.  How's this week look to schedule a call or in person meeting?  Plz advise - Thx Ryan

Plz advise - Thx Ryan
